asset.Name: X-Division Weapon Pack
asset.Description:
[ALPHA / PUBLIC TEST] Research is instant and manufacturing costs $100 for testing. Values NOT balanced for normal gameplay.

Contributors welcome! Leave a comment if interested in balancing, new weapon lines, aliens, etc.

== WEAPONS ==

=== Plasma (15 weapons) ===
Pistol, Rifle, Shotgun, Sniper, LMG x Mk1/Mk2/Mk3
Damage: Energy | ArmourPen: 10-28%

=== Gauss Mk3 (5 weapons) ===
Pistol, Rifle, Shotgun, Sniper, LMG Mk3
Damage: Kinetic | ArmourPen: 18%

=== Antimatter (15 weapons) ===
Pistol, Rifle, Sniper, Cannon, Minigun x Mk1/Mk2/Mk3
Damage: Kinetic | ArmourPen: 90% | ArmourDest: 10-20%

== INTERROGATIONS (20 new) ==
Adds rank-specific interrogation research for:
  Psyon/Sebillian/Wraith: Officer, Elite, Leader, Praetorian
  Secton/Andron: Elite, Praetorian
  Mantid: Officer, Elite
  Eternal / High Eternal
Requires capturing the corresponding alien alive.

== TECH TREE ==

Plasma:
  Alien Plasma Weapons + Psyon Officer Interrogation
    -> Advanced: + Psyon Leader + Wraith Officer
      -> Ultimate: + Psyon Praetorian + Wraith Elite + Wraith Leader

Gauss Mk3:
  Gauss Damage upgrade + Sebillian Officer/Elite/Leader Interrogation

Antimatter:
  Singularity Core + Ultimate Gauss + Ultimate Plasma
  + Sebillian Praetorian + Wraith Praetorian
    -> Advanced: + Eternal Interrogation
      -> Ultimate: + High Eternal Interrogation

Total: 35 weapons + 7 weapon research + 20 interrogation research + 11 captured items
All weapon icons from X-Division. 3D models use existing game assets.

Credits: Original X-Division mod by Charon and the X-Division team.

Supported game version: 7.18.4+
